_note: Populated after training run (Days 4-5). Each delta requires p<0.05 paired bootstrap (Delta A). Delta B negative result is acceptable and publishable.

delta_a.description: Trained LoRA (Qwen 3.5) vs Week 10 baseline agent on Tenacious-Bench held_out

delta_b.description: Trained LoRA vs prompt-engineered version (same Qwen 3.5 backbone, no training) on held_out
delta_b.note: Negative result is acceptable and publishable — report honestly

delta_c.description: Trained LoRA vs Week 10 tau2-Bench pass@1=0.8333 — informational only
delta_c.note: No tau2-Bench retail re-runs. Use existing trace_log.jsonl result.
